title: Wrinklefricker [Homestuck]
description: Replaces the Mace model with the 4th hammer from Homestuck, a combination of the Pogo Hammer and an Iron!
body:
Replaces the Mace model with the [Wrinklefucker](https://mspaintadventures.fandom.com/wiki/Hammerkind?file=Wrinklefucker.png#Wrinklefucker) hammer from [Homestuck](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Homestuck)!  
An OR combination of the [Pogo Hammer](https://mspaintadventures.fandom.com/wiki/Hammerkind?file=Pogohammer.png#Pogo_Hammer) and a Steam Iron.  

This is my first minecraft model so don't judge :D
